name: Minecraft 1.21.4
description: A vanilla Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.4 server (The Garden Awakens). Runs a Paper-compatible server with optimized JVM flags. Accept the EULA automatically, configure max players, gamemode, and more via environment variables.

defaultFiles.start.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# ─── Minecraft 1.21.4 Server Startup ────────────────────────
echo "[A2Panel] Setting up Minecraft 1.21.4 server..."

# Accept EULA
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt

# Download server jar if not present
if [ ! -f server.jar ]; then
  echo "[A2Panel] Downloading Minecraft 1.21.4 server jar..."
  curl -o server.jar -L "https://piston-data.mojang.com/v1/objects/e6ec2f64e6080b9b5d9b471b291c33cc7f509733/server.jar"
fi

echo "[A2Panel] Starting Minecraft 1.21.4..."
java -Xms${MEMORY_MIN:-512}M -Xmx${MEMORY_MAX:-2048}M \
  -XX:+UseG1GC \
  -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled \
  -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 \
  -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions \
  -XX:+DisableExplicitGC \
  -jar server.jar nogui
defaultFiles.server.properties:
# Minecraft Server 1.21.4 Properties
# Generated by A2Panel
motd=\u00a7b\u00a7lA2Panel \u00a7r\u00a7f\u2014 Minecraft 1.21.4
max-players=20
difficulty=normal
gamemode=survival
level-name=world
level-seed=
allow-nether=true
enable-command-block=false
online-mode=true
pvp=true
view-distance=10
simulation-distance=10
server-port=25565
motd=A Minecraft 1.21.4 Server — Powered by A2Panel
